abilities.description: A weak melee attack that has a chance to hit multiple times.Upgraded: A melee attack that has a chance to hit multiple times.

abilities.description: A melee attack that hits twice. Each punch inflicts Bruise 1.Upgraded: A melee attack that hits thrice! Each punch inflicts Bruise 1.

translation.ru_description: Ближняя атака, наносящая 2 удара. Каждый удар накладывает 1 Ушиб.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Ближняя атака, наносящая 3 удара! Каждый удар накладывает 1 Ушиб.
translation.en_description: A melee attack that hits twice. Each punch inflicts Bruise 1.
translation.en_upgraded_description: A melee attack that hits thrice! Each punch inflicts Bruise 1.

abilities.description: A melee attack that hits twice. Each punch inflicts Bruise 1.Upgraded: A melee attack that hits thrice! Each punch inflicts Bruise 1.

abilities.description: Knock back a unit 4 tiles, then dash forward and attack it.Upgraded: Knock back a unit 10 tiles, then dash forward and attack it.

translation.ru_description: Отбросьте юнита на 4 клетки, затем сделайте рывок и атакуйте его.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Отбросьте юнита на 10 клеток, затем сделайте рывок и атакуйте его.
translation.en_description: Knock back a unit 4 tiles, then dash forward and attack it.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Knock back a unit 10 tiles, then dash forward and attack it.

abilities.description: Attack everything around you 3 times.Upgraded: Attack everything around you in a wide area 3 times.

translation.ru_upgraded_description: Атакуйте всё вокруг в широкой области 3 раза.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Attack everything around you in a wide area 3 times.

abilities.description: You and each allied cat do a spin attack at the same time.Upgraded: You and each allied cat do a spin attack at the same time. (This spell costs less.)

translation.ru_description: Вы и каждый союзный кот делаете Атаку-Вращение.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Вы и каждый союзный кот делаете Атаку-Вращение.
